founders.name: Kevin Garcia
founders.title: Co-Founder
founders.description: Ex-Rocket Lab — 10 years of propulsion engineering. Lead CAPSTONE engine development testing. Touched every successful Rocket Lab engine. Over 44 launches. Also worked for SpaceX and The Exploration Company.

founders.name: Michael Lambert
founders.title: Co-Founder
founders.description: Launch vehicle design and development including Rocket Lab's Electron from first flight through flight 30+. Deep HTP experience across tanks, valves, and PMDs. Led the fluid and RCS systems for the Lunar Photon that delivered CAPSTONE to the Moon.

investors.name: Maia Royal
investors.title: Capital Partner
investors.description: Co-founder of The Pure Food Co — a multi-national medical nutrition company serving aged care and clinical markets. Brings business and scaling experience from a regulated category, and capital to early-stage hardware.
